/usr/bin/cc -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_api_contract.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_api_contract.dir/tests/test_api_contract.c.o -o test_api_contract  -Wl,-rpath,/home/shreesoftech/projects/test1/astro_packages/jpl-ephemeris-/build-calceph-runtime:/tmp/jme-calceph-deb/root/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu libjme.so -lm -Wl,-rpath-link,/tmp/jme-calceph-deb/root/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu
